name: musicalist-launch
description: Musicalist launch script with development utilities

scripts.launch: npm run compile && npm run dev
scripts.launch:build: npm run build && npm run start
scripts.launch:clean: npm run reset && npm run launch

launch-info.description: Comprehensive launch script for Musicalist development

commands.npm run launch: Compile TypeScript and start dev server
commands.npm run launch:build: Full build and preview production version
